auth.label: API Token
auth.description: RealPhoneValidation API token passed as the token query parameter. Get or regenerate it from the validation page inside your RealValidation account: https://my.realvalidation.com/.

actions.name: validate_phone_standard
actions.description: Validate one 10-digit phone number with the RealPhoneValidation Turbo Standard endpoint.

phone.description: The 10-digit US phone number to validate, using numeric digits only.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Turbo Standard phone validation request.

status.description: The line status returned by RealPhoneValidation, such as connected, disconnected, busy, or pending.

anyOf.description: The upstream error text returned by RealPhoneValidation when the request was not a normal validation success.
The detected phone type returned by RealPhoneValidation, such as Mobile, Landline, or VoIP.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Turbo Standard validation result returned by RealPhoneValidation.

actions.name: validate_phone_v3
actions.description: Validate one 10-digit phone number with the RealPhoneValidation Turbo v3 endpoint and return caller enrichment fields when available.

phone.description: The 10-digit US phone number to validate, using numeric digits only.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Turbo v3 phone validation request.

status.description: The line status returned by RealPhoneValidation, such as connected, disconnected, busy, or pending.

anyOf.description: The upstream error text returned by RealPhoneValidation when the request was not a normal validation success.
The detected phone type returned by RealPhoneValidation, such as Mobile, Landline, or VoIP.
The subscriber name returned by RealPhoneValidation when available.
The carrier or service provider returned by RealPhoneValidation when available.
The caller type returned by RealPhoneValidation, such as Consumer or Business.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Turbo v3 validation result returned by RealPhoneValidation.
